{{CargoRelic
|name=Mona Lisa
|rank=S
|affct=ART
|birthday=07-20
|source=* Fragment Crafting (18.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.68%)
* [[Kim Chi-yum]] - [[Rare Rent]]
|description=On Jul 20, AD 1503, Leonardo da Vinci completed the famous masterpiece of Mona Lisa.

Leonardo da Vinci painted this portrait in Florence for over three years. With soft tones and delicate technique, he painted the lady's face, neck, and hands. It became a piece representative of the Renaissance. The most iconic feature of the painting is her enigmatic smile. 

[Basic Info]

Type: Oil Painting<br>Collected by: Louvre Museum, France<br>Specifications: 77 cm in length, 53 cm in width<br>Date of Creation: Renaissance
|fame=61
|art=96
|fth=61
|civ=50
|tech=64
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Snail ATK +10<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Snail ATK +20<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +6<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Snail ATK +30<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Snail HP +500<br>Snail ATK +50<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +15<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss5=Snail HP +700<br>Snail ATK +70<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +21<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss6=Snail HP +1000<br>Snail ATK +100<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Snail HP +1000<br>Snail ATK +100<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br>Snail HP +1,000 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|genesim|crit|30}}
|skill2={{Skills|arena|lifesteal rate|30}}
|skill3={{Skills|tadpolepond|art|15}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Partner Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:CRIT % Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Lifesteal Rate Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Realm Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Organs]]
